approvalSource: Steve and the orchestrator explicitly pivoted repeated build-lane failures to P0 before Card 2; red fingerprints must block sprint progression or attach to a live repair card.
scopeSummary: Upgrade repeated build-lane and Foundation job failures from passive telemetry into a blocking action gate with owner, repair card, next action, and sprint decision before parallel-builder work.
constraints: No parallel builders until this P0 gate closes or routes a higher-priority repair card.
Do not treat repeated red failures as watch-only telemetry.
Do not weaken, skip, bypass, or demote verifier, ship, fanout, or backlog hygiene failures.
Do not run live extraction, provider probes, auth-required or paid jobs, Drive mutation, sends, or external writes.
